address: 7557 Arlington Expressway Unit N102, Jacksonville, FL 32211
title: Renovated 1 Bed/1 Bath – Lease Now & Get Up to One Month Free!
description:
Now is the perfect time to make your move and take advantage of this limited-time special!

Lease today and enjoy up to one month free on select apartment homes. 

With comfortable living spaces and a community designed to feel like home, this opportunity won’t last long, reach out today before it’s gone!

Experience the perfect blend of space and style in our renovated 1 Bedroom / 1 Bath apartment. This thoughtfully designed 725 sq. ft. floor plan features bright, modern interiors and a private balcony or patio. 

Conveniently located in Jacksonville’s Alderman Park, you’ll be just minutes from major highways for easy access to shopping, dining, and entertainment.

Community Amenities:

- Sparkling swimming pool and welcoming clubhouse
- Pet-friendly community with a dog park and beautifully landscaped grounds
- Fully equipped fitness center
- 24-hour laundry facility and responsive on-site management

Schedule your tour today and see why you’ll love calling our community home!




 
 
 Rental Terms 
 
 Rent: $999 




 Application Fee: $50 

 Security Deposit: $500 


 Available Now
